body:
Done. Implemented Graphify context enrichment:

- Created src/core/graph.ts with loadGraphData() and enrichFromGraph()
- Added Zod schemas for GraphNode, GraphEdge, GraphConcept, GraphData
- Integrated graph enrichment into brief.ts (buildBrief now calls enrichFromGraph)
- Added three optional fields to Brief interface: relatedFiles, concepts, impactHints
- Graceful degradation: missing/invalid graph data returns empty arrays
- Added graph_data_invalid diagnostic code to result.ts
- Added 4 tests for graph enrichment (load, validate, enrich, missing data)

All acceptance criteria met:
- loadGraphData returns CommandResult<GraphData>
- GraphData includes nodes, edges, concepts
- Brief enrichment adds relatedFiles, concepts, impactHints
- Missing/invalid graph data degrades gracefully (empty arrays)
- 112 tests pass, typecheck clean, biome clean, validate clean
